headings.rule: Never use generic sans for headings. Maintain Montserrat for impact and brand consistency. Never exceed the text size hierarchy limits.

colors.archetype: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST (Adapted to existing CutSync tokens)
rules: No full-screen gradients. Use solid colors with texture.
Use #F5A524 strictly for primary actions (Accept Invite, Approve).
Color is function: Keep 95% of the UI monochrome (canvas, surface, text), using color exclusively to guide action and indicate status.

surfaces: Use 'glassSurface' (from tokens) for sticky headers and modal overlays: rgba(255,255,255,0.72) with 20px blur. Never use transparent backgrounds.
Use 'atmosphericShadow' for floating action cards like the Invite Acceptance Card.
visual enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E4E4E7 on default cards, applying nested radii (child <= parent) for crisp edges.

invite_acceptance_card.elements: Inviter Identity (Top), Workspace Context (Middle), Primary CTA (Center), Security Cue (Bottom).
invite_acceptance_card.style: Flat surface background with 1px border and atmosphericShadow. No transparent backgrounds.

role_management_matrix.elements: Role labels, Status indicators (Active/Pending/Expired), Action menu (Revoke/Resend).
role_management_matrix.style: Dense mode, tight gaps, sharp edges or max 8px border-radius.

signup_form.modifications: Remove any role or establishment selection. Default to pure client registration.

grids.dashboard_mode: High Density Grid (MODE B) for admin panel - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
grids.marketing_mode: Bento Grid (MODE A) for Request Establishment landing section - wide gap-8 to gap-12, asymmetrical tension.

layouts.superadmin_dashboard: Collapsible left sidebar. Top-left metric 'Pending Approvals'. Clean status cards leading to detailed list views. Responsive mobile-first.
layouts.invite_flow: Immersive single focus layout. Center content horizontally and vertically. No distracting nav links.
layouts.general: Never center-align paragraphs. Left-align dense content and forms. Generous spacing (p-6, p-8) inside containers.

motion.interactions: Hover states (-translate-y-1, subtle shadow), Focus states (ring-2 ring-brand), Entrance animations (staggered list items for pending requests).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). NEVER use 'transition: all'.

accessibility.contrast: Text below 18px needs 4.5:1 ratio. Large text needs 3:1. Focus states must have higher contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="accept-invite-button"`, `data-testid="approve-establishment-button"`).
accessibility.forms: Use semantic labels, aria-hidden for decorative icons.

media.icons: lucide-react for system icons. Use 2-4 keyword searches for assets if needed.
media.images: Not primarily needed for admin panel, but if 'Request Establishment' needs an illustration, use geometric, high-contrast monochrome shapes with a splash of #F5A524.

3d libraries.usage: Not recommended for this specific security/dashboard update. Maintain flat, data-dense 2D layouts for clarity and security transparency.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extension_rule: CRITICAL: The workspace strictly uses `.js` files instead of `.tsx`. You must create or modify files using the `.js` extension for all new UI components. Do not output `.tsx` files.
instructions_to_main_agent.signup_fix: Modify the registration flow to completely drop 'role' and 'establishment_id' fields from client input. Force pure 'client' account creation on the server side.
instructions_to_main_agent.membership_and_rls: Migrate authorization logic to a strict `memberships` table. Write negative RLS tests to prove that normal clients cannot escalate privileges or take over establishments.
instructions_to_main_agent.establishment_request: Build a secure form for clients to request a new establishment. Insert record with status 'pending_approval'.
instructions_to_main_agent.superadmin_panel: Design a Superadmin dashboard using High Density Grid (MODE B) to list, approve, or reject establishment requests securely. Include real-time audit components.
instructions_to_main_agent.invite_flow: Implement single-use invite generation valid for 24 hours. The Superadmin invites Admins; Admins invite Professionals. Create a frictionless single-column Accept Invite page.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testid: Add `data-testid` attributes to every new form input, submit button, and action row.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the mold: use asymmetrical layouts, layered depth, and glass-morphism effects (backdrop filters 12-24px blur).
Do not use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors with texture.
NEVER use 'transition: all'. Explicitly define transition properties.
DO NOT center align the app container. Preserve human reading flow.
Use modern pill-shaped or sharp buttons with interactive animations.
Never use placeholder URLs or AI emoji characters for icons.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in headers, overlays, or any surface that has content under it.
